_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Rain postpones Saturday's Rays game, will make up July 17 in split doubleheader
items.snark: Mother Nature showing more mercy to Boston pitchers than opposing lineups lately.

items.headline: Justin Slaten returns from oblique injury, hopes to steady shaky Red Sox bullpen
items.snark: Slaten's back from the IL and Weissert's been pitching like he owes the Rays money.

items.headline: Payton Tolle set for emotional Mother's Day start, first May 9 outing since mom's death
items.snark: Tolle pitching on Mother's Day weekend for his late mom, someone cutting onions in Fenway today.

items.headline: Garrett Crochet throwing on flat ground at 60 feet, working back from shoulder inflammation
items.snark: Crochet's playing catch while the rotation burns, classic Red Sox injury management.

items.headline: Caleb Lomu takes reps strictly at left tackle during rookie minicamp Saturday
items.snark: First round tackle working left side exclusively, Will Campbell sweating like he's back at LSU.

items.headline: Patriots rookie minicamp wraps Sunday with 17 tryout players competing for roster spots
items.snark: Seventeen camp bodies fighting for two roster spots, Vegas won't even set a line on this.

items.headline: Patriots sign TE Eli Raridon and LB Quintayvious Hutchins to rookie deals
items.snark: Raridon signed his deal, now he just needs to learn how to block before September.

items.headline: Rob Gronkowski voted into Patriots Hall of Fame as 38th inductee
items.snark: Gronk gets into the Pats Hall before learning how to spell Hall, a true legend.
